LimitObserver checks cap, CategoryTracker updates breakdown.

Singleton, Facade, Observer, Repository, Strategy (x2), Builder
OS detects app open/close, calls DigitalWellbeingService
Tracker creates session on open, ends on close, fires event
Observers: persist, refresh stats, check limit, track category
Repository abstracts storage. Strategy swaps SQLite/File/InMemory
On startup, purge data older than 7 days
